text:
There once was a clever caterpillar named Casey. Casey loved exploring gardens. One sunny day, Casey came across a peculiar flower shaped like a book. Intrigue grabbed Casey's interest. He read everywhere he could, discovering countless stories of wisdom.

Wanting to learn secrets too, Casey curled up inside the blossomed pages. Hours drifted into twilight as Casey learned about kings, queens, wizards, and knights. When dark fell, Casey imagined adventures inside that book.

One night, dreaming became reality. A wise owl appeared, offering three wishes. Casey wished for endless spring days, for friendships like his own, and for wisdom the size of an apple.

And so, Casey blossomed not just outside but inside too. He became cleverer. Friends surrounded him. The wise owl's advice carved deeper knowledge deep inside Casey.

Years turned into decades. Casey never forgot tales tucked away in his heart, his book forever open. After all, wisdom was everywhere you knew to look.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
